title: apps/dashboard scaffold — Vite + React + @vykeai/vysual-react
description: Set up apps/dashboard/ as npm workspace. Vite + React 19 + TypeScript + Tailwind + @vykeai/vysual-react. ThemeProvider with themes.sweech. Empty grid layout: hero strip + sessions row + 3-col mid. Stub panels as Card placeholders. Zustand store with slices per panel. useSSE hook with exp-backoff reconnect. Root npm run build wires tsc + vite build into dist/dashboard/.
